sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Valley air, thick with dread
Whispers creep inside my head
Shadow stretched, a mountain tall
Making giants of us all
They count the spears, the glint of steel
Don't know the quiet strength I feel
Just a shepherd, out of place
Doubt etched on every face

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But the brook sings a different tune
Underneath this pale, cold moon
Washing over fear's design
A steady heart, a faith that's mine

sections.label: Chorus
lines: This would make the best chorus)
Five smooth stones, in the hollow of my hand
Not by might, but where I stand
Hear the silence, hold your breath
Facing down the face of death
Five smooth stones, a whisper and a prayer
Cutting through the thickened air

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Armor heavy, not my own
This battle's fought with what I've known
The open sky, the flock I lead
Planting an unlikely seed
They see a boy, too small to fight
Don't see the fire, burning bright
This giant roars, a thunderous sound
But my feet are firm on hallowed ground

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: And the wind carries something new
A quiet strength, about to break through
Washing over doubt's dark stain
A steady hand, a loosed refrain

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Five smooth stones, in the hollow of my hand
Not by might, but where I stand
Hear the silence, hold your breath
Facing down the face of death
Five smooth stones, a whisper and a prayer
Cutting through the thickened air

sections.label: Bridge
lines: One small sling, a single aim
More than muscle, more than name
It's the beat inside, the will to rise
Reflected in these hopeful eyes
The world may laugh, the odds may scream
But I'm living out a bigger dream

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Five smooth stones, in the hollow of my hand
Not by might, but where I stand
Hear the silence, hold your breath
Facing down the face of death
Five smooth stones, a whisper and a prayer
Cutting through the thickened air

sections.label: Outro
lines: Stone flies true...
Silence falls...
Echoes in the valley walls...
Giant fall...
Giant fall...
Just a whisper... after all.
